name: Scrapybara
notes: The public docs omit many operational and billing details. Vendor statements such as 'under 1 second' and 'milliseconds' for cold start are marketing phrasing. For paused-instance billing, isolation, GPU availability, and RAM-level snapshot behavior, contact Scrapybara sales or support.
pricing_model: Monthly subscription tiers based on allocated compute-hours
summary: Scrapybara provides virtual desktop and browser infrastructure designed for computer-use AI agents to perform tasks. It allows developers to deploy secure, remote environments where agents can interact with digital interfaces and execute code via an API.
